Welcome you probably know the title and you’re wondering what are the details for today? -Well early access is not available -if you are a gorilla tag player, you probably know you have to pay for shining rocks but in this game you get free ones every second and you get 1 million once you get this game -it’s free to play -bans are 1 hour from moderator -codes don’t work (they are still working on it) -Don’t ASK FOR MODERATOR IN REVIEW IT SAYS IT AND THE APPLICATION IS IN DISCORD SERVER-updates every 3 days
